overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, holographic advertisements, and a blend of futuristic skyscrapers with traditional Asian architecture. The scene transitions from commercial streets through underpasses to a plaza with a massive digital cherry blossom tree, ending at a traditional pagoda structure.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit street at night, with the camera turning right at an intersection toward a building with prominent pink neon signage. The environment features futuristic glass towers and reflective wet asphalt. As the camera progresses, it approaches an open plaza dominated by a large cylindrical advertising tower with rotating digital displays.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a semi-covered underpass with concrete pillars and overhead lighting, passing a food cart vendor on the right. The environment transitions from the open plaza into a darker tunnel section before emerging into a covered walkway featuring a prominent blue anime billboard on the left wall.

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a narrow alley with a chain-link fence on the right, then opens onto a main street featuring a traditional pagoda-style building. The crowd density increases slightly as the camera approaches a tunnel entrance marked by distinctive purple neon overhead lights.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a dark tunnel illuminated by purple neon strips overhead, then emerges into an open plaza featuring a spectacular digital cherry blossom tree with glowing pink holographic blossoms. A yellow-lit food stall is visible to the right as the camera approaches an elevated walkway.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along an elevated walkway with glowing green edge lighting, passing close to the branches of the digital cherry blossom tree. The scene transitions as the camera descends toward a traditional pagoda structure with red pillars and hanging lanterns, mixing traditional architecture with the surrounding neon-lit cyberpunk environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched cyberpunk city, transitioning from commercial streets and industrial underpasses to a serene plaza blending futuristic holograms with traditional architecture. It begins on a wet, reflective street, turning past pink neon signage toward a plaza dominated by a rotating cylindrical advertising tower. The camera then moves through a semi-covered underpass and a darker tunnel, passing a food vendor before emerging into a walkway marked by a blue anime billboard and a narrow alley. As the path opens onto a main street with a pagoda-style building, the camera enters a tunnel illuminated by purple neon strips that leads directly into an open plaza featuring a massive digital cherry blossom tree with glowing pink holographic blossoms. Finally, the movement glides along an elevated walkway with green edge lighting, descending from the holographic branches toward a traditional pagoda structure adorned with red pillars and hanging lanterns.
